gist.headline: Flashlearn joins the hive
gist.blurb: Flashlearn has landed in the greenhouse! Turn your documents into true/false flashcards and generate AI audio lessons for your next study session.
gist.summary: Added Flashlearn to the community apps showcase, a tool that generates true/false flashcards and AI audio lessons from documents.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Flashlearn in the community directory to enhance their desktop study sessions with AI-generated audio and flashcards.
gist.visual_concept: Flashcards, documents, and audio study sessions. Polly the bee wearing headphones studying flashcards, while the Nomnom creature eats documents to process them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, studying a glowing true/false flashcard. Nearby, the round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of paper documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny headphones, studying a glowing true/false flashcard. Nearby, the round tan nomnom creature happily eats a stack of paper documents. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background.
